nodes.name: Conirostrum
nodes.summary: Conirostrum（Conirostrum）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联11种鸟类，如Bicolored conebill、Pearly-breasted conebill、Chestnut-vented conebill等11种鸟类。

nodes.name: Tamarugo conebill
nodes.summary: The tamarugo conebill (Conirostrum tamarugense) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It breeds in northern Chile and is a vagrant to southern Peru, and receives its name from the tamarugo, a type of shrub to which it is closely associated. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist montane forests, subtropical or tropical dry shrubland, subtropical or tropical high-altitude shrubland, and plantations. It is threatened by habitat loss. References External links BirdLife Species Factsheet.
